changes.description: Baseline run with original unmodified skill (11 files, verbose SKILL.md with supporting technique docs, test/pressure files, creation log)

Removed 10 irrelevant files (test-academic.md, test-pressure-1/2/3.md, CREATION-LOG.md, find-polluter.sh, condition-based-waiting-example.ts, condition-based-waiting.md, defense-in-depth.md, root-cause-tracing.md). Condensed SKILL.md from ~297 lines to ~40 lines focusing on the core 4-phase debugging process. Removed verbose examples, rationalizations table, and references to external skills.
